LanguageData.EchoColony.UseLocal: Use local model (e.g., Ollama, KoboldAI, LM Studio)
LanguageData.EchoColony.ChatGizmoDesc: Start a conversation with this colonist.
LanguageData.EchoColony.GeminiTooltip: gemini flash: Fast and light. gemini pro: More immersive, but slower and more demanding.
LanguageData.EchoColony.DebugModeLabel: Enable Debug Mode (Save AI responses to Desktop)
LanguageData.EchoColony.DebugModeTooltip: Creates a text file with each AI response to help diagnose issues. Only activate if necessary.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ClearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the entire conversation?
LanguageData.EchoColony.UsePlayer2Tooltip: You just need Player2 running and logged in. No API key or extra setup required.
LanguageData.EchoColony.Player2Warning: ⚠️ Player2 is active. Other model settings are ignored.
LanguageData.EchoColony.GroupChatDesc: Start a group chat with nearby colonists.
LanguageData.EchoColony.MemoriesAutoCreated: Memories will be created automatically\nwhen closing conversations
LanguageData.EchoColony.ClearAllMemoriesConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all memories of {0}?\n\nThis action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ColonistNoLongerPresent: {0} is no longer part of this conversation.
LanguageData.EchoColony.AllColonistsGone: The conversation comes to an end.
LanguageData.EchoColony.MemoriesTooltip:
View and edit {0}'s memories
Memories are automatically generated during conversations and help the colonist remember past interactions.
LanguageData.EchoColony.TestVoiceTooltip: Play test text with the selected voice
LanguageData.EchoColony.NoCharactersFound: ⚠️ No characters found in Player2. Make sure Player2 is running and has characters loaded.
LanguageData.EchoColony.IgnoreAgeTooltip: Use for synthetic or alien colonists to ignore age-based behavior.
LanguageData.EchoColony.IgnoreDangersTooltip: When enabled, colonists will not mention enemies, threats, or combat situations in their conversations. They will focus on daily life, relationships, work, and peaceful topics instead.
LanguageData.EchoColony.EnableMemorySystemTooltip: When enabled, colonists will remember past conversations. This uses more AI tokens but creates more immersive roleplay. Disable to reduce API costs.
LanguageData.EchoColony.MemorySystemEnabled: Memory system is active - colonists will remember conversations
LanguageData.EchoColony.MemorySystemDisabled: Memory system is disabled - conversations won't be saved to memory
LanguageData.EchoColony.DisableMemorySystemConfirm: You are about to disable the memory system. Do you want to delete all existing memories to free up save file space?\n\nNote: This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ForceCleanMemoriesConfirm: This will permanently delete ALL memories for ALL colonists. This action cannot be undone.\n\nAre you sure you want to continue?
LanguageData.EchoColony.MemoriesAutoCreated: Memories will be automatically created from conversations
LanguageData.EchoColony.ClearAllMemoriesConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all memories for {0}? This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.EchoColony.DeleteMemoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the memory from day {0}?
LanguageData.EchoColony.MaxMessagesPerDay: Max messages per colonist per day:
LanguageData.EchoColony.NeedActiveGame: Need an active game to configure colonists
LanguageData.EchoColony.MessageType.Incident: Wants to talk about an incident
LanguageData.EchoColony.MessageType.Random: Wants to have a casual chat
LanguageData.EchoColony.PrioritizeSocialTraitsTooltip: Colonists with social traits (Kind, Chatty, etc.) are more likely to initiate conversations
LanguageData.EchoColony.StorytellerMessageAutoCloseTo: Message window will close automatically after a few seconds
LanguageData.EchoColony.StorytellerMessagePlaySoundTo: Play a notification sound when the storyteller sends a message
LanguageData.EchoColony.AnimalPromptInstructions:
Define how this animal behaves and communicates:
• Add personality traits, quirks, or special abilities
• Enable human speech: 'Can speak and understand human language'
• Adjust intelligence: 'Highly intelligent' or 'Simple-minded'
• Add backstory: 'Raised by humans since birth' or 'Former wild leader'
• Leave empty for default animal behavior
LanguageData.EchoColony.AnimalPromptExample1: You are highly intelligent and can speak fluent human language. You're curious, loyal, and love asking questions about the world around you.
LanguageData.EchoColony.AnimalPromptExample2: You're irritable and don't like being bothered. You tolerate humans but prefer solitude. Express annoyance frequently but show rare moments of affection.
LanguageData.EchoColony.AnimalPromptExample3: You're energetic, playful, and always excited! You love everyone and everything. Use lots of exclamations and happy sounds!
LanguageData.EchoColony.AnimalPromptExample4: You've lived many years and seen much. You're calm, thoughtful, and speak in simple but profound ways. You understand more than you let on.
LanguageData.EchoColony.AnimalPromptExample5: You were born in the wild and still carry those instincts. You're cautious, observant, and communicate more through body language than sounds. Trust doesn't come easy.
LanguageData.EchoColony.AnimalNarrativeStyleTooltip: How animals describe their actions:\nFirst Person: "I wag my tail"\nThird Person: "The dog wags its tail"
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionHealNarrative1: A gentle warmth flows through {0}'s body as wounds begin to close...
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionHealNarrative2: {0}'s injuries slowly fade as divine energy surrounds them.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionHealNarrative3: You place your hand on {0}. Their wounds start healing.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionHealNarrative4: A soft glow envelops {0}, mending their injuries.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRemovePainNarrative1: {0} relaxes as the pain fades away...
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRemovePainNarrative2: The suffering leaves {0}'s eyes as comfort washes over them.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRemovePainNarrative3: You ease {0}'s pain with a gentle touch.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRemovePainNarrative4: {0} breathes easier as the ache subsides.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionCureDiseaseNarrative1: The sickness leaves {0}'s body, vitality returning.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionCureDiseaseNarrative2: {0} shakes off the illness as health is restored.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionCureDiseaseNarrative3: Divine light purges the disease from {0}.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionCureDiseaseNarrative4: {0}'s fever breaks as the infection clears.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionLearnSkillNarrative1: {0}'s eyes light up with understanding as new knowledge takes hold.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionLearnSkillNarrative2: You guide {0} through the lesson. They learn quickly.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionLearnSkillNarrative3: Something clicks for {0} - they've mastered a new skill.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionLearnSkillNarrative4: {0} practices intently and suddenly grasps the technique.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionImproveBondNarrative1: The bond between you and {0} grows stronger...
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionImproveBondNarrative2: {0} nuzzles closer, trust deepening in their eyes.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionImproveBondNarrative3: A moment of connection - {0} understands you better now.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionImproveBondNarrative4: You and {0} share a meaningful moment together.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionTameNarrative1: {0} looks at you with newfound trust and acceptance.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionTameNarrative2: The wildness fades from {0}'s eyes as they join your colony.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionTameNarrative4: Something shifts in {0} - they're one of yours now.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionFeedNarrative1: You provide {0} with nourishment. They eat contentedly.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionFeedNarrative2: {0}'s hunger fades as sustenance appears before them.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionFeedNarrative3: Food materializes for {0}, who devours it eagerly.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionFeedNarrative4: You ensure {0} is well-fed and satisfied.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRestNarrative1: {0} settles down, peaceful sleep overtaking them.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRestNarrative2: Exhaustion leaves {0}'s body as rest is granted.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRestNarrative3: You ease {0} into comfortable, restorative slumber.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionRestNarrative4: {0} yawns and curls up, fatigue melting away.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionComfortNarrative1: You comfort {0}, their spirits visibly lifting.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionComfortNarrative2: {0}'s mood brightens as worry fades away.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionComfortNarrative3: A sense of peace washes over {0}.
LanguageData.EchoColony.ActionComfortNarrative4: {0} seems happier, stress leaving their demeanor.
